falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 5200 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break of the August 2024 low equivalent (pattern-matched support) invalidates the 79% bottom similarity; the structure would no longer map to a successful bottom formation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Blowoff score of 39 suggests contained fear; VIX >35 indicates panic escalation inconsistent with a bottoming pattern and instead signals a liquidation cascade, proving the HOLD signal was premature

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops more than 40bps from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A flight-to-safety of that magnitude indicates systemic stress or recession pricing, which would invalidate a bottom call as it implies the macro engine misread the economic regime

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
